subject: Bump snapshot version to 1.14.2-SNAPSHOT
commit_message:
Bump snapshot version to 1.14.2-SNAPSHOT

- bump snapshot version to 1.14.2-SNAPSHOT
- increase timeout of ComponentPage class to 60 (instead of 20)
  to see if that resolves TimeoutException's in the pipeline
- Update yarnVersion to 1.22.19
- Update nodeVersion to 20.14.0

Issue-ID: SDC-4729
Change-Id: Icd0463bfa4af82b3d641bb8ed83d6fad82e9836f
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <Fiete.Ostkamp@telekom.de>

entries.message:
